questionHtml: Two charges Q1 and Q2, each equal to 2 nC, are separated by a distance 3 m in a vacuum. What is the electric force on Q2 and the electric field due to Q1 at the position of Q2?

meta.title: Two charges Q1 and Q2, each equal to 2 nC, are separated by a distance 3 m in a vacuum. What is the electric force on Q2 and the electric field due to Q1 at the position of Q2?
